prompt_text:
### Demographics: 38-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: No DKA/HHS symptoms; no recent hypoglycemia episodes; no acute complaints; Despite repeated counseling on insulin need, the patient strongly refuses injections; shared decision was made to intensify oral therapy and reassess within 2-4 weeks.

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 2 (60-89)
ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
Body mass index category: Normal
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 2 (60-89); HF (No); ASCVD: Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history; MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Normal
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (younger brother)
- Social history: Current smoker (15 cigarettes/day for 30 years; ~22.5 pack-years); Alcohol 1-2 drinks/week

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Glimepiride 4mg once daily; Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 46.5 kg; Height 150.6 cm; BMI 20.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 118/60 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.9%; 9 months ago 9.2%; 6 months ago 9.7%; 3 months ago 10.1%; current 10.0%), FPG (12 months ago 248mg/dL; 9 months ago 259mg/dL; 6 months ago 270mg/dL; 3 months ago 283mg/dL; current 300mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 43.9kg; 9 months ago 45.8kg; 6 months ago 45.8kg; 3 months ago 45.8kg; current 46.5kg), Height (12 months ago 150.6cm; 9 months ago 150.6cm; 6 months ago 150.6cm; 3 months ago 150.6cm; current 150.6cm), BMI (12 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 20.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 20.0kg/m²; current 20.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 120mmHg; 9 months ago 120mmHg; 6 months ago 120mmHg; 3 months ago 120mmHg; current 118mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 60mmHg; 9 months ago 61mmHg; 6 months ago 60mmHg; 3 months ago 61mmHg; current 60mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 19U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 15U/L), AST (12 months ago 17U/L; 9 months ago 26U/L; 6 months ago 25U/L; 3 months ago 18U/L; current 21U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.6mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 73mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 76mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 75mL/min/1.73m²; current 74mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 35mg/g; 9 months ago 25mg/g; 6 months ago 33mg/g; 3 months ago 35mg/g; current 29mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 81mg/dL; 9 months ago 84mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 81mg/dL; current 85mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 41mg/dL; 9 months ago 37mg/dL; 6 months ago 40mg/dL; 3 months ago 37mg/dL; current 39mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 152mg/dL; 9 months ago 158mg/dL; 6 months ago 169mg/dL; 3 months ago 170mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 12.2g/dL; 6 months ago 12.9g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.6g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 1.13 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited. Strong injection refusal is documented; under shared decision-making, the patient accepts oral regimen adjustment with short-interval reassessment.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
